allowed_public_metadata: public canonical source title and URL
Diff-ID and other public revision identifiers
correction, withdrawal, supersession and successor relationships
minimal public status information needed for version resolution
prohibited_public_content: non-public workflow identifiers or internal status codes
execution, queue, monitoring or review records
non-public strategy, experiment procedures, measurement procedures or recovery procedures
truth_boundaries: publicly available does not automatically mean canonical
canonical does not automatically mean latest unless the current source indicates it
metadata does not replace the parent source
AI-generated or AI-assisted text is not automatically an official Nakagawa Master statement
publication history may remain accessible even after current content is corrected or removed
